---
title: "recorder.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/tools/pennyone/live/recorder.ts"
loc: 9
complexity: 2
logic_score: 8.40
style_score: 9.30
intel_score: 10.00
overall_score: 9.23
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 8.4/10
- **Style [S]**: 9.3/10
- **Intel [I]**: 10.0/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 0 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [*](file://../types.js)
- [*](file://../intel/database.js)

### Exports
- `recordPing`
